applied_fixes.issue: Missing canonical tags on dynamic route entries causing potential duplicate content indexing.
applied_fixes.action: Implement dynamic canonical link generation based on current window location path.

applied_fixes.issue: Critical LCP delay due to unoptimized main hero image loading.
applied_fixes.action: Add 'fetchpriority="high"' and remove 'lazy' attribute from the primary hero image component.

applied_fixes.issue: Missing structured data (JSON-LD) for organization schema.
applied_fixes.action: Inject Organization Schema markup into the head section to improve search result rich snippet eligibility.
